acceptance_targets: [chapter_16_award_01] Pass if the revised decision beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:151, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:163, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:175, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:181 includes at least one identifiable, in-the-moment human consequence from the battle before Owen withdraws from the hostile-wand claim, and his refusal still reads as a conscious choice after that pressure arrives. Fail if the beat remains primarily hypothetical, system-level, or relation-based.

[chapter_16_craft_01] Pass if the revised clause-discovery beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:129, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:133 teaches the reader what the clause does through Owen's parsing plus immediate interruption or consequence, and no single paragraph remains a self-contained three-term rules summary. Fail if the scene still stops to define the clause mostly as exposition.

[chapter_16_prose_01] Pass if revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:117, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:161 leave no more than two corrective-negation constructions in that set and replace at least two of them with direct positive images. Fail if the same 'not X / not exactly Y' cadence still dominates those beats.

[full_award_003] Pass if, by reading the revised scene at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4856, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4862, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4892, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4898, a reader can name at least two distinct upstairs human stakes Owen is weighing, not just 'the battle' in general. Fail if the clause still lands mainly as a conceptual choice between system branches.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised decision beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:151, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:163, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:175, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:181 includes at least one identifiable, in-the-moment human consequence from the battle before Owen withdraws from the hostile-wand claim, and his refusal still reads as a conscious choice after that pressure arrives. Fail if the beat remains primarily hypothetical, system-level, or relation-based.
findings.problem: The chapter's defining refusal is intellectually legible but not yet devastating enough for shortlist-level impact because the battle above stays abstracted into 'evidence' and 'relation' for too much of the decision beat. Owen's distance is character-true, but the scene does not force enough concrete human counterpressure into the room before he chooses the seam over the fighters.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the choice sequence around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:151, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:163, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:175, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:179 so at least one surface-world consequence reaches Owen as a specific contemporaneous human event, not only as a hypothetical example or magical relation. Keep his analytic filtering, but make the filtering an active refusal against concrete pressure rather than the chapter's default distance.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised clause-discovery beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:129, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:133 teaches the reader what the clause does through Owen's parsing plus immediate interruption or consequence, and no single paragraph remains a self-contained three-term rules summary. Fail if the scene still stops to define the clause mostly as exposition.
findings.problem: The hostile-wandwork discovery turns into a compact rules brief at the exact point where the scene most needs friction. The three-part gloss of 'hostile', 'wandwork', and 'suspended' explains the mechanism cleanly, but it pauses the chapter to paraphrase system semantics instead of making Owen earn the understanding through interruption, resistance, or immediate consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the discovery passage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:129, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:133 so the clause's meaning emerges through Owen's reading under battle pressure rather than through a single uninterrupted explanatory block. Compress the term-by-term gloss and let the chamber, the manuscript, or the sounds above force the interpretation into smaller dramatic beats.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:117, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:161 leave no more than two corrective-negation constructions in that set and replace at least two of them with direct positive images. Fail if the same 'not X / not exactly Y' cadence still dominates those beats.
findings.problem: The prose leans too repeatedly on corrective-negation constructions ('not bright', 'not welcoming, not exactly', 'not paint and not quite paste', 'did not heal exactly', 'relation, not faces'). That syntax suits Owen in moderation, but here it becomes a chapter-level tic that keeps defining things by what they are not and flattens rhythmic variety.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast several of the repeated corrective-negation beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:117, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:161 into direct affirmative description. Keep Owen's exactness, but vary the sentence logic so the prose sometimes names the thing cleanly instead of approaching it through repeated self-cancellation.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by reading the revised scene at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4856, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4862, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4892, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4898, a reader can name at least two distinct upstairs human stakes Owen is weighing, not just 'the battle' in general. Fail if the clause still lands mainly as a conceptual choice between system branches.
findings.problem: The repair sequence is vivid, but the scene weights cosmic-system legibility more concretely than the battle above. The hostile-wandwork clause arrives as an intellectual problem before it fully arrives as a bodily moral emergency, because the upstairs side is still delivered mostly as generic screams, pressure, and distorted voices.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the clause-discovery run at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4856, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4862, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4892, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4898 so the undercroft remains the POV, but the upstairs stakes become more specifically human. Feed in at least two concrete identifiers already earned by the novel: Neville's command cadence, Martha's impaired gait or fighting rhythm, Prue's position near the kitchens, a named younger student, or a recognizable corridor/courtyard geography. Keep the system logic, but braid it against traceable people rather than mostly acoustic abstraction.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
